display.purpose: Route titles, onboarding headlines, and important empty-state headings.

body.purpose: Main UI copy, descriptions, and readable explanations.

label.purpose: Buttons, nav labels, metadata, status chips, and compact controls.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: State changes only: hover, focus, active, selected, expanded, and loading transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Compact primary action using Workbench Ink and inverse foreground.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid transparent; background: oklch(0.145 0 0); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.5; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.145 0 0 / 80%); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.708 0 0 / 30%); outline-offset: 2px; border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Subtle secondary action with a visible boundary and quiet hover fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.5; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.922 0 0 / 50%); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.708 0 0 / 30%); outline-offset: 2px; border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis action for toolbars, navigation, and repeated controls.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid transparent; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.5; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.708 0 0 / 30%); outline-offset: 2px; border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

narrative.overview:
Agentis should feel like a composed workbench for autonomous work. The interface supports long-running tasks, reusable agents, connected tools, artifacts, and quality controls with quiet precision. It should make complex agent behavior visible without turning the product into a spectacle.

The current system is a product register foundation: IBM Plex Sans, shadcn/ui primitives, Tailwind 4, compact Base UI buttons, OKLCH tokens, and a themeable light or dark surface. The product atmosphere is restrained, operational, and exact. It rejects generic AI SaaS patterns: purple gradients, vague magic language, floating orbs, mascot energy, and undifferentiated AI dashboard clichés.
keyCharacteristics: Dense enough for expert workflows, calm enough for first-run comprehension.
Tonal layers, borders, and focus rings carry hierarchy before shadow does.
Accent color is functional: active navigation, selection, status, and primary intent.
Components are compact, readable, and visibly stateful.

rules.name: The Functional Accent Rule
rules.body: Agent Blue appears only when it tells the user where they are, what is selected, or what action matters.

rules.name: The Neutral Honesty Rule
rules.body: Neutral surfaces must carry most of the product. If a screen needs decoration to feel complete, the information structure is not strong enough.

rules.name: The Compact Clarity Rule
rules.body: Controls may be small, but labels must stay readable and focusable. Do not trade legibility for density.

rules.name: The Tonal Layer Rule
rules.body: Start with surface contrast and border clarity. Add shadow only when an element floats above the document flow.

dos: Do use the product register by default: app shell, threads, agents, command center, integrations, and task workflows.
Do make agent work legible through state, steps, tools, outputs, and quality signals.
Do keep accent color functional: active navigation, current selection, system status, and primary intent.
Do use tonal layers and subtle borders before shadow.
Do support WCAG 2.2 AA with keyboard access, visible focus, reduced motion support, sufficient contrast, semantic structure, and non-color-only state indicators.
donts: Don't use generic AI SaaS patterns: purple gradients, vague magic language, floating orbs, mascot energy, and undifferentiated AI dashboard clichés.
Don't use side-stripe borders as colored accents on cards, list items, callouts, or alerts.
Don't create identical card grids with icon, heading, and text repeated without meaningful structure.
Don't make agent autonomy feel opaque, unserious, or decorative.
